CyclesTooner
Features Install GitHub 日本語

Blender toon shader assistant for Cycles

Cycles toon rendering, without rebuilding every material.

Convert Principled BSDF, MMDShaderDev, and VRM MToon materials to Toon BSDF, then add clean inverted-hull outlines powered by Geometry Nodes.

Add Extension Repository View on GitHub
Repository URL https://utagestudio.github.io/CyclesTooner/index.json
Screenshot slot Material Converter Panel Replace with assets/material-converter.png
Toon BSDFCycles-ready material conversion
MMD / VRMDirect shader path support
Geometry NodesInverted-hull outline generation
Blender ExtensionsInstall and update from repository

Designed for character and cel-look workflows

Move from imported materials to Cycles toon shading faster.

Convert materials to Toon BSDF

Replace Principled BSDF with Toon BSDF while preserving available base color, normal connections, texture alpha, and material opacity where supported.

  • Principled BSDF to Toon BSDF
  • MMDShaderDev / mmd_shader conversion
  • VRM MToon conversion

Generate clean Cycles outlines

Build inverted-hull outline objects from the selected model root using Geometry Nodes, excluding hidden meshes and keeping source collections organized.

  • Object-driven outline targets
  • Vertex weight thickness control
  • Refresh and remove outline tools

Tune opacity and smoothness in bulk

Apply opacity and Toon Smooth values across selected objects and child hierarchies, with per-material controls when the active material was converted by CyclesTooner.

  • Batch opacity slider
  • Batch Smooth slider
  • Per-material adjustment
Screenshot slot Outline Generator Replace with assets/outline-generator.png

Outlines made for Cycles

Use an inverted-hull mesh setup that renders cleanly with the Cycles renderer.

Screenshot slot Blender Extensions Install Replace with assets/extension-install.png

Install from a remote repository

Add the repository URL once, then let Blender detect updates from Get Extensions.

Cycles-native looks

Bring toon characters into Cycles-rich scenes.

Keep MMD and VRM-style toon models readable while using the lighting, lenses, reflections, and atmosphere that make Cycles valuable for final images.

Image slot Water Surface Replace with assets/cycles-water.png

Water Surface

Show reflections, transparency, and surface shimmer while keeping the character in a clean toon style.

Image slot Fisheye Lens Replace with assets/cycles-fisheye.png

Fisheye Lens

Use stylized wide-angle camera work without separating the toon model from the scene treatment.

Image slot Volumetric Light Replace with assets/cycles-volumetric.png

Volumetric Light

Add fog, backlight, and visible light shafts around toon characters for a more cinematic render.

Blender 4.2+

Install from the Extension Repository.

  1. Open Blender and go to Edit > Preferences > Get Extensions.
  2. Choose Repositories > Add Remote Repository.
  3. Paste the CyclesTooner repository URL.
  4. Enable update checks and install CyclesTooner from the extension list.
Extension repository https://utagestudio.github.io/CyclesTooner/index.json Open index.json

Requirements

Built for Blender toon rendering workflows.

Blender
Blender 5.0 recommended / 3.0+
Renderer
Cycles recommended, especially for outlines
License
GPL-3.0-or-later
Documentation
English README / 日本語README

Asset Credits

Showcase images use or reference the following third-party character, scene, and motion assets. Please refer to each source page for the latest license and usage terms.

  • Character models: Tohoku Zunko, Tohoku Kiritan, and Zundamon from ZunZun Project illustration / 3D data.
  • Scene asset: Lakeside Cabin in the Mountains from BlendKit.
  • Scene asset: Wooden Plank Pathway from BlendKit.
  • Scene asset: Stairs from BlendKit.
  • Motion / pose reference: Sour Kagamine twins "sugar" MMD motion distribution on Bilibili.
